data.detail: Server returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * — any origin can read responses.
data.remediation: Restrict ACAO to a specific trusted origin. Never use wildcard when credentials are involved.

data.detail: CSP prevents XSS and data injection attacks by controlling allowed resource sources.
data.remediation: Add a strict CSP: 'default-src \'self\'; script-src \'self\'; object-src \'none\';'

data.detail: HSTS forces HTTPS connections and prevents SSL-stripping attacks.
data.remediation: Add: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload

data.detail: Missing Referrer-Policy may leak sensitive URL information to third parties.
data.remediation: Add: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

data.detail: Missing Permissions-Policy allows access to powerful browser APIs (camera, mic, etc.).
data.remediation: Add: Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=()

data.detail: Missing COOP allows cross-origin pages to access window references.
data.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin

data.detail: Missing CORP allows cross-origin pages to load this site's resources.
data.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin

data.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS' lacks HttpOnly flag — readable by JavaScript, enabling XSS-based session theft.
data.remediation: Set HttpOnly attribute: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS=...; HttpOnly

data.detail: Possible base64-encoded data detected in cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS' value.
data.remediation: Never store sensitive data directly in cookie values. Use server-side sessions.

data.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' lacks HttpOnly flag — readable by JavaScript, enabling XSS-based session theft.
data.remediation: Set HttpOnly attribute: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=...; HttpOnly

data.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' lacks Secure flag — transmitted over HTTP, vulnerable to interception.
data.remediation: Set Secure attribute: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=...; Secure

data.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' has no SameSite attribute — CSRF attacks may succeed.
data.remediation: Add SameSite=Lax or SameSite=Strict: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=...; SameSite=Strict

data.detail: Possible base64-encoded data detected in cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' value.
data.remediation: Never store sensitive data directly in cookie values. Use server-side sessions.

data.evidence: Authorization endpoint accepted request without state param
data.detail: The OAuth2 authorization endpoint did not require a 'state' parameter. This allows CSRF attacks to hijack the OAuth flow and steal tokens.
data.remediation: Enforce the 'state' parameter on all OAuth2 authorization requests. Validate state on the callback to prevent CSRF.

data.detail: The authorization server does not enforce PKCE for public clients. Authorization codes can be intercepted and exchanged by attackers.
data.remediation: Enforce PKCE (RFC 7636) for all public clients. Require code_challenge_method=S256.

data.remediation: Move sensitive files outside web root. Never deploy .env to production.

data.detail: Git repository exposed — source code leakage risk

data.detail: CSP prevents XSS and data injection attacks by controlling allowed resource sources.
data.remediation: Add a strict CSP: 'default-src \'self\'; script-src \'self\'; object-src \'none\';'

data.detail: Missing X-Frame-Options allows clickjacking attacks (embedding site in iframes).
data.remediation: Add: X-Frame-Options: DENY  (or use CSP frame-ancestors directive instead)

data.detail: Missing header allows MIME-type sniffing, enabling content injection.
data.remediation: Add: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff

data.detail: Missing Referrer-Policy may leak sensitive URL information to third parties.
data.remediation: Add: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

data.detail: Missing Permissions-Policy allows access to powerful browser APIs (camera, mic, etc.).
data.remediation: Add: Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=()

data.detail: Missing COOP allows cross-origin pages to access window references.
data.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin

data.detail: Missing CORP allows cross-origin pages to load this site's resources.
data.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin

data.detail: Server version disclosure may aid attacker fingerprinting.
data.remediation: Configure web server to omit or genericize the Server header.

data.detail: Web Application Firewall identified: Cloudflare. 8/8 attack payloads blocked.
data.remediation: WAF 'Cloudflare' detected — bypass techniques generated below.

data.detail: Bypass technique for Cloudflare: URL double-encode: %253Cscript%253E
data.remediation: Update WAF rules and test against bypass vectors regularly.

data.detail: Bypass technique for Cloudflare: Unicode fullwidth: ＜script＞alert(1)＜/script＞
data.remediation: Update WAF rules and test against bypass vectors regularly.

data.detail: Bypass technique for Cloudflare: Case mixing: <ScRiPt>alert(1)</sCrIpT>
data.remediation: Update WAF rules and test against bypass vectors regularly.

data.technique: Chunked Transfer-Encoding with TE: chunked header
data.detail: Bypass technique for Cloudflare: Chunked Transfer-Encoding with TE: chunked header
data.remediation: Update WAF rules and test against bypass vectors regularly.

data.technique: JSON content-type with GET body bypass
data.detail: Bypass technique for Cloudflare: JSON content-type with GET body bypass
data.remediation: Update WAF rules and test against bypass vectors regularly.

data.detail: Bypass technique for Cloudflare: HTTP/2 header smuggling (H2.CL)
data.remediation: Update WAF rules and test against bypass vectors regularly.

CVE-2024-47701 affects 'None detected' — In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:
